tables.name: EMPLOYEES
tables.rawDdl:
CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEES (
  EMPLOYEE_ID NUMBER(10) NOT NULL,
  FIRST_NAME VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL,
  LAST_NAME VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL,
  HIRE_DATE DATE NOT NULL,
  DEPARTMENT_ID NUMBER(6),
  RESUME LONG,
  ORG_CHART XMLTYPE,
  CONSTRAINT PK_EMPLOYEES PRIMARY KEY (EMPLOYEE_ID)
);

tables.name: PAYROLL_RUNS
tables.rawDdl:
CREATE TABLE PAYROLL_RUNS (
  RUN_ID NUMBER(10) NOT NULL,
  EMPLOYEE_ID NUMBER(10) NOT NULL,
  PAY_PERIOD_START DATE NOT NULL,
  PAY_PERIOD_END DATE NOT NULL,
  GROSS_PAY NUMBER(12,2) NOT NULL,
  TAX_WITHHELD NUMBER(12,2) NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT PK_PAYROLL_RUNS PRIMARY KEY (RUN_ID),
  CONSTRAINT FK_PAYROLL_EMPLOYEE FOREIGN KEY (EMPLOYEE_ID) REFERENCES EMPLOYEES(EMPLOYEE_ID)
);
